name: Jenkins
tagline: Jenkins is a self-contained, open source automation server which can be used to automate all sorts of tasks related to building, testing, and delivering or de
description:
Jenkins is a self-contained, open source automation server which can be used to automate all sorts of tasks related to building, testing, and delivering or de


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  jenkins:
    image: jenkins/jenkins:lts-jdk11
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - jenkins-jenkins-home:/var/jenkins_home
    ports:
      - 42054:8080
volumes:
  jenkins-jenkins-home: null
